component.name: StowIt
component.summary: The universal drop buffer — drop anything, pin what matters, everything expires

description.p: StowIt is a lightweight, always-on drop zone that sits at the edge of your screen. Drag files, text, images, or links into it — or just copy to your clipboard and it captures automatically.
Items expire after 10 minutes unless you pin them. No clutter, no cleanup, no thinking required.

Features include automatic clipboard capture, drag and drop, QR code sharing to mobile, auto-expiring items with pin to keep, LAN Zones for team sharing, REST API for automation, and integrations with Slack, Discord, and Obsidian.
No account required. No cloud. No tracking. 100% local-first.
Polish pass: drag-and-drop fix, zone persistence, zone picker, pin limits, improved window resizing.
